text:
Once upon an autumn evening, there was a cozy little house filled with warm colors. Inside rested a girl named Ada. She liked reading books about witches. Tonight, she discovered an old tome buried deep within her grandmother's attic.

With heart pounding fast, Ada opened it. Legends talked of an oracle owl weaving dreams. She blinked owl feathers onto her eyes. Her dreams were vivid. The owl seemed pleased.

First dream: She wandered fields littered with autumn dreams. A mist embraced them. She picked petals.

Second dream: Birds sang from oak branches.

Third dream: Stars climbed nightly.

Fourth dream: Water flowed amber.

She felt old magic.

With owl feather ears twitched.

Tomorrow she'd find fox fur.

Something told her fox knew owl secrets.

Late asleep.

Stars whispered tales.

That owl knew moon runes.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
